source.description: A reviewed six-panel graphite-and-colored-pencil process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent empty astronaut helmet in a slightly turned three-quarter view on warm off-white paper, with no astronaut face, body, lettering, flag, logo, spacecraft, stars, planet, or decorative border.

process_strategy: The sequence locks one rounded shell, front visor reserve, center axis, and neck-ring footprint; wraps the outer helmet around those guides; adds the visor and side housings without drawing hidden shell detail; introduces seams, vents, fittings, reflections, and shadow; then shades and colors every established form before final cleanup only.

final_elements.name: helmet shell guides, visor reserve, center axis, side planes, and neck-ring footprint
final_elements.description: Light construction fixes a slightly turned helmet with one rounded shell, a large blank visor opening, simple side planes, and a lower neck-ring footprint.

final_elements.name: astronaut-helmet silhouette with rounded shell, visor brow, side housings, and neck ring
final_elements.description: A confident outer contour turns the guides into a readable helmet while preserving the reserved visor and neck-ring areas.

final_elements.name: dark visor opening, raised visor rim, lower seal, and layered neck collar
final_elements.description: The broad visor, its rim and seal, and the collar layers establish the helmet's front structure without adding a face.

final_elements.name: panel seams, side connector, two vents, visor highlight bands, amber visor tint, and ground shadow
final_elements.description: A few functional seams and fittings, two restrained visor reflections, a light amber tint, and a shallow shadow add believable hardware and depth.

final_elements.name: graphite depth with pale blue-gray shell color and softened visor and shadow shading
final_elements.description: Soft graphite, cool shell color, and blended visor and ground-shadow shading complete the already established helmet while keeping visible paper and pencil texture.

frames.visible_job: Places the rounded shell, visor reserve, center axis, side planes, and lower neck-ring footprint at one fixed scale and angle.
introduces: helmet shell guides, visor reserve, center axis, side planes, and neck-ring footprint

frames.visible_job: Wraps the guides with the rounded helmet shell, visor brow, side housings, and neck ring while leaving the visor footprint blank.
introduces: astronaut-helmet silhouette with rounded shell, visor brow, side housings, and neck ring
requires_prior_elements: helmet shell guides, visor reserve, center axis, side planes, and neck-ring footprint

frames.visible_job: Adds the dark visor opening, raised rim, lower seal, and layered neck collar inside the reserved construction footprints.
introduces: dark visor opening, raised visor rim, lower seal, and layered neck collar
requires_prior_elements: helmet shell guides, visor reserve, center axis, side planes, and neck-ring footprint
astronaut-helmet silhouette with rounded shell, visor brow, side housings, and neck ring

frames.visible_job: Places panel seams, one side connector, two small vents, two visor highlight bands, a light amber visor tint, and a shallow ground shadow on established forms.
introduces: panel seams, side connector, two vents, visor highlight bands, amber visor tint, and ground shadow
requires_prior_elements: astronaut-helmet silhouette with rounded shell, visor brow, side housings, and neck ring
dark visor opening, raised visor rim, lower seal, and layered neck collar

frames.visible_job: Adds soft graphite depth, pale blue-gray shell color, and blended visor and ground-shadow shading to the completed structure.
introduces: graphite depth with pale blue-gray shell color and softened visor and shadow shading
requires_prior_elements: astronaut-helmet silhouette with rounded shell, visor brow, side housings, and neck ring
dark visor opening, raised visor rim, lower seal, and layered neck collar
panel seams, side connector, two vents, visor highlight bands, amber visor tint, and ground shadow

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens the established shell, visor, collar, hardware, reflections, graphite depth, restrained color, and ground shadow.
allowed_changes: small highlight clarification on the established visor and shell

rejection_checks: No shell contour, visor, rim, seal, collar, housing, seam, connector, vent, reflection, color area, or shadow may first appear in the final panel.
The helmet must retain one empty three-quarter view, visor angle, neck-ring width, scale, and crop across all six panels.
Reserve the visor and neck-ring footprints from step one; do not render finished shell seams beneath either covering form.
Reject faces, heads, bodies, lettering, logos, flags, stars, planets, spacecraft, decorative borders, or extra props.
The finish must read as an attainable graphite-and-colored-pencil study rather than glossy science-fiction concept art or a vector icon.
